category_sources: source_facts.description says Interpreter for Rexx; official homepage https://regina-rexx.sourceforge.io/ describes Regina as a Rexx interpreter.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is Regina Rexx Interpreter at https://regina-rexx.sourceforge.io/.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to Documentation at https://regina-rexx.sourceforge.io/doc/index.html, which points to SourceForge documentation files.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project has a Code tab and SourceForge code tree; source_facts.homepage is the official Regina site.
tags_sources: Official homepage https://regina-rexx.sourceforge.io/ says Regina is a Rexx interpreter ported to many platforms; source_facts.executables include rexx and regina.
